title: Merits Earned
query: SELECT COALESCE((SELECT SUM(Count) FROM PowerplayCollect WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate), 0) AS collected, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(Count) FROM PowerplayDeliver WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate), 0) AS delivered

details.text: {collected} merit(s) collected and {delivered} merit(s) delivered during the report period. Merits are the currency of political loyalty — each one represents a commodity run, a fortification action, or an undermining operation carried out in service of your chosen Power.
details.help: PowerplayCollect fires when merits are picked up; PowerplayDeliver when cashed in. collected drives the title as the total acquisition.

tagLines: Powerplay merit activity compiled. The relevant Power's systems office has noted your contribution to the weekly cycle.
Every merit was a trip made. Some were dangerous. The Power only counts the ones that delivered.
Merits expire. You got yours in on time. Your power's expansion thanks you. Probably.
